title: Smoking Hot Delightful Middle Eastern Ground Meat Kibbeh Triangle
description: A citrusy, shattering, solo-dinner middle-eastern dish featuring jamaican curry powder, smoke-hot, kosher-friendly, form=kibbeh, vessel=ti-leaf-wrap.
instructions: Mix the ground meat, jamaican curry powder, lemon juice, olive oil, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until just combined.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Using your hands or a spatula, shape the meat mixture into small kibbeh triangles.
Place the triangles on the preheated skillet or griddle and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until shattering and golden brown.
Transfer the kibbeh triangles to a plate and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Note: Use a ti-leaf wrap to serve the kibbeh triangle if desired.
